# Kaspa

> Real-time Decentralization
> bitcoin's proof-of-work without the wait.

## Real-time Decentralization

- [Real-time Decentralization](https://kaspa.org/)
- bitcoin's proof-of-work without the wait.

## LORE

- [LORE](https://kaspa.org/lore)
- Kaspa is a live proof-of-work blockDAG running at 10 blocks per second.

## HODL

- [HODL](https://kaspa.org/hodl)
- Buy KAS and move it into a wallet you control.

## BUIDL

- [BUIDL](https://kaspa.org/build)
- WASM SDK, native Rust libraries, and node infrastructure for building on Kaspa.

## DAGVIZ

- [DAGVIZ](https://kgi.kaspad.net/)
- [Explorer](https://explorer.kaspa.org/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/kaspanet/rusty-kaspa/)
- [X](https://x.com/search?q=kaspa)
